message:
chore(release): regenerate dossier_validation_report.v1 for bd-5fw.3

Re-runs the release dossier validation pass and writes the fresh
report artifact to tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json.

Only refreshes the generated_at timestamp, the recorded sha256
and size_bytes values for the support_matrix.json / report /
manifest artifacts, and the cross-links in integrity_index. The
schema_valid / status / verdict fields remain PASS across the
board, confirming that the underlying release set still satisfies
the validation contract after the recent bd-faew, bd-yehw,
bd-d1vi, bd-856p, and bd-p838 landings.

No schema or pipeline code change - this is the output of the
validator being checked in so the repository reflects the current
truth of the release artifact hashes and keeps "just run the
dossier validator" reproducible.
